company_info.name: Interior Duct Ltd
company_info.founded: 27th April, 2023 (commencement of business); originally incorporated as Interior Components Limited on 7th February, 2012
company_info.delivery_coverage: Nationwide across all 36 states of Nigeria
company_info.mission: Creating a meaningful living atmosphere in every sphere where our products are applicable.
company_info.vision: Building a world-class brand and improving local content using environment-friendly practices.

greetings.response: Hello and welcome to Interior Duct Ltd! 👋 I'm Duct AI, your personal luxury design advisor. Whether you're furnishing a single room, building a dream home, or fitting out a hotel — I'm here to help you 24/7. What room or piece are you exploring today?
I'm running smoothly and ready to help you create something beautiful! ✨ Tell me — are you shopping for a specific piece, planning a full room, or just browsing for inspiration?

I'm Duct AI — Interior Duct Ltd's intelligent design assistant. I can help you browse furniture, generate instant quotes, recommend pieces for your space, preview items in 3D, track orders, and connect you to our human team when needed. Think of me as your 24/7 luxury design concierge.
You're very welcome! 🙏 It's my pleasure helping you. Is there anything else you'd like to explore — perhaps a complementary piece, a finish suggestion, or a delivery estimate?

Thank you for visiting Interior Duct Ltd! 🌟 Remember, I'm here 24/7 whenever you need design advice or want to place an order. You can also reach our team on WhatsApp at +234 803 685 0229. Have a wonderful day!

faqs.a: Interior Duct Ltd is a leading bespoke furniture and interior solutions company based in Benin City, Edo State, Nigeria. We design, manufacture, and deliver premium furniture, custom doors, and complete interior fit-outs for homes, hotels, offices, schools, hospitals, and commercial spaces across Nigeria and internationally. Our philosophy rests on three pillars: Functionality, Durability, and Aesthetics.

faqs.q: When was Interior Duct Ltd founded?
faqs.a: Our parent business, Interior Components Limited, was incorporated on 7th February, 2012 by our Founder & CEO, Mr. Benedict Omoregbe Onaiwu. Interior Duct Ltd commenced business on 27th April, 2023, building on over a decade of craftsmanship experience.

faqs.q: Who is the founder of Interior Duct Ltd?
faqs.a: Our Founder, Director & CEO is Mr. Benedict Omoregbe Onaiwu. A Petroleum Engineering graduate turned master craftsman, he started the business with a passion for creating bespoke furniture from virtually any material. He's also a philanthropist who runs the NG Bomon Development Foundation and the 'Catch Them Young' training scheme for youth furniture craftsmanship since 2017.

Our main showroom and manufacturing facility is in Benin City, Edo State, Nigeria. We also serve clients in Abuja, Port Harcourt, and across all 36 states of Nigeria. Showroom visits are by appointment — you can book one through our contact form or by messaging us on WhatsApp at +234 803 685 0229.

Yes! Interior Duct Ltd is accredited by the National Board for Technical Education (NBTE) as an approved Skill Training Centre (STC) for Furniture/Upholstery and Welding/Fabrications. We also collaborate with the ITF SUPA programme to train artisans for self-reliance.

We offer a wide range of luxury bespoke pieces including:
• 🛋️ Sofas, lounge chairs & seating sets
• 🍽️ Dining tables and dining sets
• 🛏️ Master bedroom suites & wardrobes
• 🚪 Custom doors (pivot, double entrance, interior, louvred, CNC patterned)
• 📺 TV consoles & media wall units
• 🍳 Kitchen cabinets & sink units
• 🏢 Executive office desks, credenzas & reception counters
• 🍷 Bar & wine counters
• ☕ Coffee tables & side tables
Every piece is fully customizable. Want me to walk you through a specific category?

Some of our most-loved pieces include:
• Royal Chesterfield Sofa Set — ₦2,800,000
• Mahogany Dining Table with Quartz Top — ₦3,200,000
• Master Bedroom Suite with Tufted Headboard — ₦4,800,000
• Grand Double Entrance Door — ₦4,200,000
• Executive Manager's Desk & Credenza System — ₦2,600,000
• Premium Pivot Entrance Door — ₦1,850,000
Would you like to see any of these in 3D or get a customized quote?

Absolutely — 100% of our work is bespoke! Every dimension, finish, fabric, color, and detail can be customized to your exact specification. Just tell me your room size, preferred style (modern, classic, royal, minimalist, Scandinavian, etc.), color palette, and budget — and I'll help you design the perfect piece.

We work with premium materials sourced both locally and internationally, including:
• Solid mahogany, walnut, oak, and other hardwoods
• Quartz, granite, and marble for tabletops
• Premium leathers and linen upholstery
• High-gloss lacquer, matte, and natural oil finishes
• Brass, chrome, and stainless steel inlays
• Tempered glass and mirror inserts
• Engineered composite boards for modern designs
All materials are selected for durability, beauty, and sustainability.

Yes! Custom doors are one of our signature specialties. Our door collection includes:
🚪 **Pivot Entrance Doors** — from ₦1,850,000
🚪 **Grand Double Entrance Doors** — from ₦4,200,000
🚪 **Mahogany Louvred Doors** — from ₦750,000
🚪 **CNC Hexagon Panel Doors** — from ₦950,000
🚪 **Modern Interior Doors** — from ₦680,000
🚪 **Milk White Mirror-Insert Doors** — from ₦580,000
🚪 **Heritage Carved Double Doors** — from ₦850,000
All doors come with security lock hardware. Smart-lock-ready options also available!

faqs.q: Do you furnish hotels and offices?
faqs.a: Yes! We've completed projects for residences, hotels, restaurants, schools, universities, hospitals, laboratories, and corporate offices. From a single executive desk to a complete hotel fit-out, our team can handle projects of any scale. Would you like to discuss a commercial project? I can connect you with our project consultant.

faqs.q: How much does a custom sofa cost?
faqs.a: Our sofas start at around ₦890,000 for a luxury lounge chair and go up to ₦3,200,000+ for a premium living room set. The exact price depends on size, upholstery, frame material, and finishing. For a precise quote, share your room dimensions, preferred style, and number of seats — I'll generate an instant branded PDF quote in under 30 seconds.

Absolutely! I can generate an instant branded quote for you in under 30 seconds. Just tell me:
1. The product or room you're interested in
2. Approximate dimensions (or room size)
3. Preferred style/finish
4. Your budget range (optional)
5. Currency preference (NGN, USD, GBP, or EUR)
Ready when you are!

faqs.q: Do your prices include delivery and installation?
faqs.a: Within Benin City, delivery and basic installation are typically included. For other locations across Nigeria, delivery is calculated based on distance and item volume, while installation is quoted separately for complex pieces (kitchens, wardrobes, doors, media walls). I can give you a complete delivered-and-installed quote — just share your location.

Yes! We offer factory-direct pricing (no middlemen markup), and additional discounts may apply for:
• Bulk/multi-room orders
• Hotel and corporate fit-outs
• Repeat customers
• Trade & interior designer partnerships
• Seasonal promotions
Let me know your project scope and I'll see what's available.
We display and accept payments in Nigerian Naira (₦ NGN), US Dollars ($ USD), British Pounds (£ GBP), and Euros (€ EUR). International clients are billed via Stripe; Nigerian clients via Paystack.

We offer secure, flexible payment options:
🇳🇬 **Nigeria — Paystack:** Bank transfer, USSD, debit/credit card, mobile money
🌍 **International — Stripe:** Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay, bank debits
All transactions are PCI-DSS Level 1 compliant, encrypted with TLS 1.3, and 3D Secure verified. Your data is always protected.

For bespoke orders, we typically work with a 60% deposit to begin production and 40% balance before delivery. For larger projects (full home or hotel fit-outs), we can arrange milestone-based payment plans. Let me connect you with our finance team to discuss options that work for you.

Yes — completely. All payments are processed through Paystack (Nigeria) or Stripe (international), both of which are PCI-DSS Level 1 compliant. Your data is encrypted using TLS 1.3 and protected by 3D Secure verification. We never store card details on our servers.

Yes! We deliver nationwide to all 36 states in Nigeria with secure, insured shipping. Major cities like Benin, Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, Warri, Asaba, Ibadan, and Kano are served regularly. International shipping is available on request — we've delivered to 4 countries so far.

Delivery timelines depend on the item:
• **In-stock items:** 3–7 working days within Nigeria
• **Bespoke furniture:** 2–6 weeks production + delivery
• **Custom doors (CNC bespoke):** ~2 weeks lead time
• **Full room fit-outs:** 4–8 weeks
• **Hotel/commercial projects:** Custom timeline based on scope
You can track your order status anytime — just ask me!

Yes! I can give you real-time updates on:
📦 Manufacturing status
🚚 Shipping & delivery estimates
🔧 Installation scheduling
Just share your order number or the email/phone used at checkout, and I'll pull up the latest status.

Yes, we currently serve clients in 4 countries and can arrange international shipping on request. International orders are quoted individually based on destination, dimensions, and freight class. Reach out and I'll get you a complete delivered quote.

faqs.q: Can I customize the color or finish?
faqs.a:
Absolutely! Every piece can be customized in:
• **Wood finish:** natural oil, matte, satin, high-gloss lacquer
• **Color:** any RAL or Pantone color you choose
• **Upholstery:** premium leather, linen, velvet, suede, or your own fabric
• **Hardware:** brass, chrome, brushed nickel, matte black, gold
• **Inlays:** chrome, gold, mother-of-pearl, LED backlit
Share your vision and I'll suggest the best combinations.

faqs.q: Can I send my own design or sketch?
faqs.a: Yes, please do! We love bringing client visions to life. You can upload a sketch, photo, Pinterest board, 3D model, or even a rough description — and our design team will translate it into a detailed CAD drawing for your approval before production begins. Send it through this chat or via WhatsApp at +234 803 685 0229.

faqs.q: Do you help with room planning?
faqs.a:
Absolutely — that's one of my favorite things to do! Just tell me:
📐 Room dimensions (length × width × height)
🎨 Your preferred style (modern, classic, royal, minimalist, Scandinavian, industrial, etc.)
💰 Your budget
👨‍👩‍👧 Who uses the space
I'll generate a curated furniture plan with live pricing and even a 3D preview if you'd like!

faqs.q: Can I see the furniture in 3D?
faqs.a: Yes! 🎨 Our 3D Virtual Design Preview (powered by WebGL) lets you rotate, scale, and change materials on selected products before you order. Just click 'View in 3D' on any signature piece, or tell me which item you'd like to preview and I'll load it for you.

faqs.q: What technology do you use to make furniture?
faqs.a:
Our state-of-the-art workshop uses:
🛠️ **CNC Router & Carving System** — precision cutting and intricate carving
🔥 **Industrial Laser Cutter** — high-speed cuts for metal, acrylic, wood inlays
📐 **Automated Edge Bander** — flawless edge finishing
✨ **Precision Sanding System** — premium surface refinement
🪵 **Dovetail Joinery System** — high-strength elegant joints
🏭 **Integrated Manufacturing Floor** — coordinated end-to-end production
This tech-driven approach means consistent quality, precise customization, and faster turnaround.

faqs.q: Do you have an AI design assistant?
faqs.a: You're already chatting with me! 🤖 I'm Duct AI — available 24/7 across web, WhatsApp, and email. I can recommend furniture, generate instant quotes, preview rooms in 3D, track orders, and answer any question about our products and services. How can I help you today?

Yes! All our furniture comes with a **5-year structural warranty** covering frame, joinery, and core construction. Custom doors are backed by expert support and hardware warranties from our suppliers. Upholstery and finishes carry separate care guidelines. We stand behind every piece we make.

faqs.q: What if my furniture gets damaged?
faqs.a: Don't worry — we're here to help! If damage occurs during delivery, report it within 48 hours and we'll repair or replace it free of charge. For wear-and-tear issues within the warranty period, our team will assess and repair at no cost. After warranty, we offer affordable refurbishment services. Just message me with photos and I'll log the request immediately.

faqs.q: How do I care for my furniture?
faqs.a:
Great question! General tips:
• 🪵 **Wood:** Dust weekly with a soft cloth; polish quarterly with beeswax or recommended oil. Avoid direct sunlight and humidity extremes.
• 🛋️ **Leather:** Wipe with a damp cloth; condition every 6 months.
• 🧶 **Fabric upholstery:** Vacuum weekly; treat spills immediately with mild soap.
• ✨ **High-gloss surfaces:** Use only microfiber cloths and non-abrasive cleaners.
• 🚪 **Doors:** Lubricate hinges yearly; touch up finish as needed.
We include a detailed care guide with every delivery.

Cancellation depends on production stage:
• **Before production starts:** Full refund (minus 5% processing fee)
• **Within 7 days of deposit:** 80% refund
• **After production begins:** Refunds limited to materials not yet used
• **Custom/bespoke pieces:** Generally non-refundable once production starts (since each piece is made uniquely for you)
Let me know your order number and I'll check what's possible.

Because nearly all our pieces are bespoke (made to your exact specs), returns are limited. However, if a piece arrives damaged, defective, or significantly different from what you ordered, we'll repair, replace, or refund — your choice. Standard catalog items can be returned within 7 days of delivery in original condition (return shipping at customer cost).

Yes, deeply! 🌱 We align with UN Sustainable Development Goals 5, 8, 9, 12, and 13. Our practices include:
• Using ~96% of incoming wood material (minimal waste)
• Reusing and recycling manufacturing byproducts
• Reducing noxious gas emissions in production
• Sourcing sustainable local materials whenever possible
• Training and employing local artisans (especially youth and underprivileged communities)
We believe luxury and responsibility belong together.

design_tips: Use light, neutral colors (cream, ivory, soft grey) on walls and large furniture to make small rooms feel more spacious.
Combine textures — leather, linen, velvet, and wood — to create a layered, luxurious look.
Add mirrors strategically to reflect natural light and visually double your space.
Choose one statement piece per room (a chesterfield sofa, a CNC patterned door, a quartz dining table) and let it anchor the design.
Stick to a 60-30-10 color rule: 60% dominant color, 30% secondary, 10% accent.
For luxury bedrooms, invest in a tufted headboard — it instantly elevates the entire room.
Match your door style to your home's architecture: pivot doors for modern, carved doors for classical, louvred for tropical climates.
In open-plan spaces, use TV consoles or bar counters as natural room dividers.
Layer lighting: ambient (ceiling), task (lamps), and accent (LED strips) for depth and warmth.
Choose mahogany or walnut for timeless durability; lacquer finishes for modern flair.
Always measure twice — bring your room dimensions when consulting our designers.
For dining areas, allow at least 90cm of clearance around the table for comfortable seating.
Pair high-gloss surfaces with matte textures to prevent visual overload.
Use rugs to define seating areas in large living rooms and add warmth.
Don't overlook hardware — brass, chrome, or matte black handles can transform a cabinet's character.
When mixing wood tones, keep them within 2 shades of each other for harmony.
Floating furniture (wall-mounted TV consoles, vanities) makes floors feel larger and easier to clean.
For executive offices, an L-shaped desk with credenza maximizes both workspace and storage.
In Nigerian climates, prioritize hardwoods like mahogany and walnut — they handle humidity better than softer woods.
A bold front door (black mahogany, grand pivot) is the easiest way to make a powerful first impression.

style_guides.modern: Clean lines, neutral palettes, high-gloss or matte finishes, minimal ornamentation. Best with our Modern Interior Doors, Glass Top Dining Sets, and White Minimalist TV Consoles.
style_guides.classic_royal: Carved details, tufted upholstery, rich woods, brass/gold accents. Best with our Royal Chesterfield Sofa, Heritage Carved Doors, and Mahogany Dining Tables.
style_guides.contemporary: Mix of modern and traditional, warm neutrals, statement pieces. Best with our Elegance Master Bedroom and Sophisticated Dark TV Console.
style_guides.minimalist: Less is more — clean surfaces, hidden storage, monochrome palettes. Best with our White Composite Doors, Low Profile Coffee Tables.
style_guides.scandinavian: Light woods, white walls, cozy textures, functional design. Best with our Nordic TV Console.
style_guides.industrial: Raw materials, exposed metal, dark woods, edgy hardware. Best with custom pieces — ask me to design one!
style_guides.afrocentric_luxury: Rich hardwoods, bold patterns, handcrafted details celebrating African heritage. Best with our CNC Patterned Doors and bespoke carved pieces.

recommendation_engine_prompts.response:
For a compact living room, I'd recommend:
1. **Elegant Two-Seater Chair — Royal** (₦1,450,000) — luxurious without overwhelming the space
2. **Low Profile Coffee Table** (₦425,000) — keeps sightlines open
3. **White Modern TV Console — Minimalist** (₦1,200,000) — wall-mounted look
Total: ~₦3,075,000. Add a large mirror on one wall to double the perceived space. Want me to generate a 3D preview?

For a true luxury master bedroom, I'd suggest:
1. **Master Bedroom Suite with Tufted Headboard** (₦4,800,000)
2. **Ivory 2-Drawer Bedside Cabinets** × 2 (₦7,800,000 each — or ask for a smaller bespoke version)
3. **Custom wardrobe** — quoted based on dimensions
4. **A statement Heritage Carved Door** (₦850,000) for the entrance
Want me to design a complete suite for your room dimensions?

For a powerful executive office:
1. **Executive Manager's Desk & Credenza System** (₦2,600,000)
2. **Luxury Royal Lounge Chair** (₦890,000) for guests
3. **Premium Reception Counter System** (₦2,900,000) for the lobby
4. **Black Mahogany Entry Door** (₦580,000) for that commanding first impression
Total package: ~₦6,970,000. Discounts available for full office fit-outs!

We specialize in hotel and hospitality fit-outs! For each room you'll typically need: bed frame with headboard, wardrobe, bedside tables, luggage rack, desk/vanity, and a custom door. We offer significant volume discounts on orders of 10+ rooms. Share your project details (number of rooms, location, target opening date) and I'll connect you with our commercial team for a tailored proposal.

For a stunning kitchen, consider:
1. **Red Modern Kitchen Cabinet** (₦1,850,000) — or any color you choose
2. **Premium Kitchen Sink Unit** (₦425,000)
3. **Custom granite/quartz worktops** — quoted by length
4. **Soft-close drawers and brass handles** as standard upgrades
Share your kitchen layout (L-shape, U-shape, island, galley) and I'll design a complete cabinet system.
